**Linear**: N/A

---

# Release Notes

## Key Changes

### ⚠️ Breaking Changes

- **SSE transport removed** ([#446](https://github.com/keboola/mcp-server/pull/446)): The `sse` transport has been removed. All clients must connect via `streamable-http`. Update any client configuration that uses `--transport sse` or `transport=sse`.

### New Features

- **Semantic layer MCP tools** ([#416](https://github.com/keboola/mcp-server/pull/416), [#450](https://github.com/keboola/mcp-server/pull/450), [#415](https://github.com/keboola/mcp-server/pull/415)): A full suite of tools for querying and managing semantic layer objects via the Keboola Metastore API. Covers tables, attributes, metrics, filters, and datasets — including list, get, create, update, and delete operations, plus dataset schema validation and SQL dimension generation.

- **Folder parameter for transformations, apps and flows** ([#438](https://github.com/keboola/mcp-server/pull/438)): `create_sql_transformation`, `update_sql_transformation`, `create_config` (data apps), `update_config` (data apps), and flow tools now accept an optional `folder` parameter that organises the component into a named workspace folder in the Keboola UI.

- **`configuration_row_ids` for `run_job`** ([#454](https://github.com/keboola/mcp-server/pull/454)): The `run_job` tool now accepts an optional `configuration_row_ids` list so a job can target specific configuration rows instead of running all of them.

### Bug Fixes / Improvements

- **`WHEN NOT TO USE` guidance in generic component tool docstrings** ([#459](https://github.com/keboola/mcp-server/pull/459)): Generic component tools (`get_components`, `get_configs`, `create_config`, `update_config`) now include explicit guidance on when to prefer a more specialised tool (e.g. `create_sql_transformation` for SQL transformations), reducing hallucination and tool misuse.

- **Clarify `parameter_updates` path is relative to `parameters`** ([#469](https://github.com/keboola/mcp-server/pull/469)): The docstring for `update_config` now explicitly states that keys in `parameter_updates` are relative to the `parameters` object, not the root configuration. This prevents subtle bugs where callers prefixed keys with `parameters.`.

## Plans for Customer Communication

- **Communication channels**: Announce SSE removal via Slack/docs; all other changes are additive and require no action.
- **Timeline**: Deployment via CI/CD pipeline after the release tag is pushed.
- **Customer action**: Any client configured with `--transport sse` must switch to `--transport streamable-http` before upgrading.
- **Transparency**: Semantic layer tools and folder/row-ID parameters are new capabilities — no existing behaviour changes except SSE removal.

## Impact Analysis

- **Affected users**: All MCP server users (SSE removal); users of transformations/apps/flows (folder param); users of `run_job` (row IDs); all users of generic component tools (docstring improvements).
- **Customer action required**: Migrate away from SSE transport before upgrading.
- **Service interruption**: None expected for clients already using `streamable-http`.
